raw_consumer_statement:
As a Costco Citi Bank XXXX XXXX customer and business partner please require XXXX Pharmacies to responsibility refund this medication payment in the amount of {$660.00} back to my Costco Citi Bank XXXX XXXX ending XXXX and request their payment through my XXXX XXXX XXXX father in laws XXXXXXXX XXXX. 

On XXXX I attempted to open Costco Citi bank XXXX dispute # XXXX through the on-line application but was redirected to contact customer service via XXXX as a satisfactory description transaction was offered through the website. 

On XXXX via XXXX  I referred to several customer service representatives that could not confirm the correct dispute transaction code through the on-line portal and didn't understand their internal on-line dispute procedure. I was ultimately referred to XXXX, Subject Matter Expert whom coded the dispute transaction as multiple payment method. I explained to her that to my knowledge the merchant had not been paid by multiple sources yet. She acknowledged my concern but as Costco Citi Bank XXXX Subject Matter Expert she filed my dispute as multiple payment methods. This is incorrect as I explained. 

The reason for the dispute as I've explained is XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX required me to pay upfront via my Costco Citi Bank XXXX Credit Card for critical, prescribed, proprietary medication while knowing they were the only supplier in possession of this medication in XXXX XXXX, CA. They also knew my XXXX XXXX XXXX father in laws critical need for this medication and him having valid healthcare insurance available for payment of this medication in their system. 

On XXXX Dispute was denied by Costco Citi Bank XXXX.
